[Output omitted because this appears to be a binary file. To inspect binary contents, call read with path "tiny.png?read_options={\"mode\":\"binary\",\"byteOffset\":0,\"byteLimit\":512}". Optional binary read_options: byteOffset defaults to 0; byteLimit is file bytes to hexdump and defaults to 512, capped at 4096.]
